description.en: Specify how many child processes will exist to handle requests at a time for ForkingMixIn. If the limit is reached, new requests will wait until one child process has finished.

excerpt.es: Specify how many child processes will exist to handle requests at a time for ForkingMixIn. If the limit is reached, new requests will wait until one child process has finished.
